filename: Does the EU AI Act stop you from using LLMs.md
title: Does the EU AI Act stop you and your employees from using ChatGPT, Claude and other LLMs?
cardTitle: The EU AI Act & using LLMs
description: For most everyday uses of ChatGPT, Claude and other LLMs, the EU AI Act's heavy obligations fall on the vendor, not you. What actually makes a use case high-risk — and what that means for deployers.

filename: An edge stops working the moment it becomes famous.md
title: An edge stops working the moment it becomes famous.
description: Being early to a tool was never the edge. A look at how optimized marketing and an urgency-driven feed manufacture the panic that you're falling behind.
